notes: v373 — Pending BUY orders (including 🤖 Auto-pilot orders) now fill more reliably. THE FIX: on days when the free data relays are slow, a pending buy could sit unfilled even when the price reached your number. The app now also uses the price data it ALREADY loaded for each share — including the day’s intraday low — to fill a pending buy the moment the price touches your limit, so a genuine hit is caught even when a separate live price lookup can’t get through. Orders that gap open below your limit fill at the better opening price; market orders fill at the day’s open as intended. Nothing changes in how you place orders. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5).
